project.name: ZeroSpoils Pilot Expansion
project.businessObjective: Reduce household food waste by improving inventory tracking and reminders.

vision.summary: Deliver a practical and measurable reduction in food waste through proactive inventory and planning workflows.

prd.summary: Define MVP scope, user journeys, acceptance criteria, and measurable quality/performance outcomes.

milestones.summary: Milestones M1-M5 define sequencing from foundations to advanced capabilities.

architectureNotes.summary: Monorepo planning plus Flutter app architecture with offline-first principles and telemetry requirements.

kpiBaseline.summary: Baseline event schema and KPI instrumentation for adoption, retention, and reliability trends.

releaseOps.summary: Release process, checks, and post-release monitoring responsibilities.

constraints.budget: Lean team budget with strict cloud spend controls
constraints.compliance: No PII in telemetry by default, explicit consent for sensitive capture workflows
constraints.technical: Flutter mobile clients, CI quality gates, offline-first UX where applicable
